description: This video explains swing trading in the crypto market, focusing on how traders can profit by borrowing and selling assets, then repurchasing them at a lower price.
topic_summary: Swing trading involves predicting price movements over a period, using both technical and fundamental analysis to inform trades. An example illustrates how a trader can profit from a price drop in Ether from $2,000 to $1,500, resulting in a $500 profit after repurchasing the asset [t=21:12].
